subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the chalice of the Covenant! Praise be unto God that, beneath the shadow of divine protection and care, thou art sheltered and preserved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست پیمانه پیمان الحمد لله در ظل حفظ و حمایت الهیه محفوظ و مصونی و بنظر
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
